originalTitle: Apple’s reportedly raising the price for AppleCare Plus on Macs and iPads
summary: An AppleCare Plus subscription for a Mac or iPad will cost more soon, with prices going up by $0.50 per month or $5 per year for new sign-ups while remaining the same for existing subscribers, according to Bloomberg's Mark Gurman. Gurman says that under the new AppleCare Plus pricing, "a plan for a new 13-inch […]
content: An AppleCare Plus subscription for a Mac or iPad will cost more soon, with prices going up by $0.50 per month or $5 per year for new sign-ups while remaining the same for existing subscribers, according to Bloomberg’s Mark Gurman. Gurman says that under the new AppleCare Plus pricing, “a plan for a new 13-inch MacBook Air increased to $7.99 from $7.49, or to $79.99 from $74.99 annually,” following a move last year that similarly raised the plan’s price on iPhones. We haven’t seen the new pricing reflected on Apple’s site in the US or terms of service yet, and Apple has not yet responded to a request for comment. Last month, Apple announced that it’s raising prices on iPads, Macs, the Vision Pro, HomePod devices, and the Apple TV 4K. The increases range from $30 on the HomePod mini to $4,200 on the M3 Ultra Mac Studio. Tim Cook attributed the price hikes to the ongoing RAM shortage, saying Apple has been trying to “shield” customers but “the situation has become unsustainable.”  Price hikes on services like AppleCare Plus could also mitigate the impact of higher component costs. Apple hasn’t raised iPhone prices yet, but the iPhone 18 Pro lineup could see an impact when it launches later this year.
chineseTitle: 据报道，苹果公司提高了 Mac 和 iPad 上的 AppleCare Plus 价格
chineseSummary: 据彭博社的 Mark Gurman 称，Mac 或 iPad 的 AppleCare Plus 订阅费用很快就会上涨，新注册用户的价格将每月上涨 0.5 美元，每年上涨 5 美元，而现有订阅者的价格将保持不变。 Gurman 表示，根据新的 AppleCare Plus 定价，“计划推出新的 13 英寸 [...]
chineseContent: 据彭博社的 Mark Gurman 称，Mac 或 iPad 的 AppleCare Plus 订阅费用很快就会上涨，新注册用户的价格将每月上涨 0.5 美元，每年上涨 5 美元，而现有订阅者的价格将保持不变。 Gurman 表示，在新的 AppleCare Plus 定价下，“新款 13 英寸 MacBook Air 的计划从 7.49 美元涨至 7.99 美元，或从每年 74.99 美元涨至 79.99 美元”，去年也曾类似地提高了 iPhone 的计划价格。我们尚未在美国苹果网站或服务条款上看到新的定价，苹果也尚未回应置评请求。上个月，苹果宣布提高 iPad、Mac、Vision Pro、HomePod 设备和 Apple TV 4K 的价格。涨幅从 HomePod mini 的 30 美元到 M3 Ultra Mac Studio 的 4,200 美元不等。蒂姆·库克将价格上涨归因于内存持续短缺，并表示苹果一直在试图“保护”客户，但“这种情况已经变得不可持续”。  AppleCare Plus 等服务的价格上涨也可以减轻组件成本上涨的影响。苹果尚未提高 iPhone 价格，但 iPhone 18 Pro 系列在今年晚些时候推出时可能会受到影响。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
